title: Midnight Italian Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Italian and Mexican flavors, perfect for a late-night snack or dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the garlic powder, Mexican oregano, and black truffle salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Warm the crushed tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a warmed tortilla and topping with shredded Parmesan cheese.
